tables.table_title: Accuracy Comparison between Natural Generation and Our Approach
tables.table_note: The table shows the accuracy comparison between natural generation and our approach. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in combining the advantages of natural and structured generation.

tables.table_title: Gain Comparison between Natural Generation and Our Approach
tables.table_note: The table shows the gain comparison between natural generation and our approach. The results demonstrate the improvement in accuracy achieved by our approach.
